_note: Synthetic recorded output for --dry-run: catches the obvious benefit/cost lines but misses the understated reduced-visibility line. ~P 1.0 / R 0.8. Replace via --live for a real number.

codings.codedText: I save almost two hours a day not commuting
I end up checking email at ten at night
I don't speak to another adult until my partner gets home
I'd take this over the open-plan office any day
